actual_title: P, NP, and the Boundaries of Efficient Computation

cards.title: Solution vs. Verification
cards.governance_note: Define problem form, certificate, verifier, and what efficient verification means.

cards.title: Reductions and Hardness
cards.governance_note: Document reductions and distinguish P, NP, NP-hard, and NP-complete claims.

cards.title: Limits and Communication
cards.governance_note: Communicate exactness, approximation, heuristics, timeouts, and unsupported optimality claims.
